docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY LOPEZ, MARIA HILL, DENNIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HILL, DENNIS (NOTE: DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN COURT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARIA LOPEZ & DEFENDANT DENNIS HILL. JUAN SUAZO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTE. (D506).
